args.query:
SELECT o.Id AS OpportunityId, o.CloseDate, oli.Product2Id, p.Name AS ProductName
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON REPLACE(oli.OpportunityId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')
JOIN (SELECT * FROM sqlite_scan('products_orders', 'Product2')) p ON REPLACE(p.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(oli.Product2Id,'#','')
WHERE REPLACE(o.ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND o.CloseDate >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND o.CloseDate < DATE '2021-07-01'
  AND LOWER(TRIM(p.Name)) LIKE '%ai%processing%unit%'
ORDER BY o.CloseDate DESC
LIMIT 10;

args.query:
SELECT oi.Product2Id, o.EffectiveDate, p.Name AS ProductName
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')
JOIN Product2 p ON REPLACE(p.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(oi.Product2Id,'#','')
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
  AND LOWER(TRIM(p.Name)) LIKE '%ai%processing%unit%'
LIMIT 50;

SELECT o.Id AS OpportunityId, o.CloseDate, oli.Product2Id, p.Name AS ProductName
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON REPLACE(oli.OpportunityId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')
JOIN (SELECT Id, Name FROM sqlite_scan('products_orders.sqlite', 'Product2')) p ON REPLACE(p.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(oli.Product2Id,'#','')

  AND CAST(o.CloseDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CAST(o.CloseDate AS DATE) < DATE '2021-07-01'
  AND LOWER(TRIM(p.Name)) LIKE '%ai%processing%unit%'
ORDER BY CAST(o.CloseDate AS DATE) DESC

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, Name FROM Product2 WHERE REPLACE(Id,'#','') IN ('01tWt000006hV8LIAU','01tWt000006hV58IAE','01tWt000006hTUkIAM','01tWt000006hV9xIAE','01tWt000006hVczIAE');

args.code:
import json, pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_mBqwoZlGbv5gsByyBjhc0aM3)
prod = pd.DataFrame(var_call_HwOBmhAilhjJNidoUYSOtyKw)

df['Product2Id_clean']=df['Product2Id'].str.replace('#','', regex=False)
prod['Id_clean']=prod['Id'].str.replace('#','', regex=False)

m = df.merge(prod, left_on='Product2Id_clean', right_on='Id_clean', how='left')
# pick AI processing unit: name contains 'ai'
ai = m[m['Name'].fillna('').str.lower().str.contains('ai')].copy()
# if multiple, pick first by CloseDate desc then OpportunityId
if not ai.empty:
    ai['CloseDate_dt']=pd.to_datetime(ai['CloseDate'])
    ai=ai.sort_values(['CloseDate_dt','OpportunityId'], ascending=[False, False])
    product_id = ai.iloc[0]['Product2Id_clean']
else:
    product_id = None

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({'product_id': product_id}))

val_args.code:
import json, pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(var_call_mBqwoZlGbv5gsByyBjhc0aM3)
prod = pd.DataFrame(var_call_HwOBmhAilhjJNidoUYSOtyKw)

df['Product2Id_clean']=df['Product2Id'].str.replace('#','', regex=False)
prod['Id_clean']=prod['Id'].str.replace('#','', regex=False)

m = df.merge(prod, left_on='Product2Id_clean', right_on='Id_clean', how='left')
# pick AI processing unit: name contains 'ai'
ai = m[m['Name'].fillna('').str.lower().str.contains('ai')].copy()
# if multiple, pick first by CloseDate desc then OpportunityId
if not ai.empty:
    ai['CloseDate_dt']=pd.to_datetime(ai['CloseDate'])
    ai=ai.sort_values(['CloseDate_dt','OpportunityId'], ascending=[False, False])
    product_id = ai.iloc[0]['Product2Id_clean']
else:
    product_id = None

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({'product_id': product_id}))
